examples: The whole meeting was an elaborately staged act of misdirection.
But even if He defeats your first attempt at misdirection, we have a subtler weapon.
Reflect on Your Goals and direction - Not doing so is committing to wasteful misdirection.
So he uses a technique that he has mastered as a thriller writer: misdirection.
Mr Makin has always said this "significant misdirection by the trial judge" opened the way for an appeal.
